name: aurora-ai-response
title: Aurora AI Response
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora AI Response — Claude Design parity.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Response.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`, and `aurora-button` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/response.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-components`, `aurora-button`.
